regime_fall.current_status: Following the collapse of Islamabad peace talks on April 12, the Trump administration has announced a comprehensive naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz with massive military deployments, while Iran's interim leadership—following Supreme Leader Khamenei's death in February—faces unprecedented internal unrest, succession uncertainty, and coordinated military pressure from the US and Israel.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Trump announced on April 13 a comprehensive US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz to increase pressure on Iran following the failed ceasefire talks, with elite combat forces including the 82nd Airborne and two Marine combat groups positioned for potential deployment.
